name: ccc-gtm
description: Go-To-Market foundation for AI automation consultants. Three skills: (1) GTM Discovery — structured interview to build ICP, positioning, offer, voice, and operational context; (2) GTM 90-Day Launch Plan — phased week-by-week action plan grounded in the discovery foundation; (3) 7 Powers Diagnostic — Hamilton Helmer's strategic-positioning framework applied as a discovery-call brief or C-Suite workshop deck, anchoring narrower CCC engagement scopes in a Vision-of-Domination story.
